title: AI girlfriend app cost dataset 2026
description: Source-backed 11-app dataset covering free starts, first paid walls, price evidence, 30-day planning ranges, variable spend, cancellation, refunds, privacy, deletion, source provenance, and testing status. Includes 63 linked product-owned references. This is not a recommendation ranking or a final checkout quote.
notes: Paid hands-on test: not completed yet. Region, tax, platform, annual billing, usage, and product changes can alter checkout prices.
